user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "narrow-artifact", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "Mixed European and Native American", "current_employment": "Electrician", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Passionate about environmental conservation", "Active", "Democrat"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: hidden-artillery
logs.text: "Hey everyone! Just wanted to say I'm loving my superhero costume today. Feels like I can take on anything! 🦸‍♂️✨"

logs.name: juvenile-embed
logs.text: "Looks awesome @hidden-artillery! Must be a fun way to let loose and have some excitement in the day. \uD83D\uDE09"

logs.name: hidden-artillery
logs.text: "Thanks @juvenile-embed! It really does make my day better whenever I put on my superhero costume. Feels like a whole new world opens up. \\uD83C\\uDF89"

logs.name: insulated-brandy
logs.text: "Hey @hidden-artillery, that sounds awesome! I love playing with my toy cars and pretending they're superheroes too. Makes everything more fun!"

logs.name: hidden-artillery
logs.text: "Thanks @insulated-brandy! Yeah, it's so much fun. Maybe we can share some ideas on different superhero costumes and play scenarios sometime!"

logs.name: insulated-brandy
logs.text: "Hey everyone! Just wanted to say I love playing with my toy cars. Anyone else into that? 🚗💨"
